# CMSNext Customization Map

## Use Workspace Instructions

- For repo-wide standards that should apply to nearly every task.
- In this repo, `copilot-instructions.md` already fills that role.

## Use File Instructions

- For path-scoped or task-scoped guidance.
- In this repo, `frontend`, `implementation`, `testing`, and `sonarqube_mcp` instructions cover those cases.

## Use A Custom Agent

- For a focused persona with a bounded tool set.
- In this repo, the custom agents are best for audit, frontend, domain, hooks, services, storage, and testing work.

## Use A Skill

- For repeatable, on-demand workflows or reference bundles that should not be modeled as a persona.
- In this repo, repository memory and delegation templates are skills.
